name: clipboard_text
description: Save or retrieve text snippets to a persistent clipboard store

action.description: Action: 'set' to save, 'get' to retrieve, 'list' to show all, 'delete' to remove

key.description: Clipboard key name (e.g. 'wifi_password', 'server_ip'). Use 'all' for list.

value.description: Value to store (for 'set'). Use 'none' for get/list/delete.
